metadata.name: Reconcile Fixed Asset Sub-Ledger to General Ledger

description: An accountant needs to ensure the total cost and accumulated depreciation in the fixed asset sub-ledger agree with the balances in the corresponding GL accounts.

nodes.task_description: Run a report from the fixed asset sub-ledger summarizing the total cost and accumulated depreciation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the summary report from the sub-ledger.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end balances for the 'Fixed Assets - Cost' and 'Accumulated Depreciation' accounts from the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the corresponding GL balances.

nodes.task_description: Compare the totals from the sub-ledger to the GL balances and confirm they match.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that both cost and accumulated depreciation reconcile perfectly.
